{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Chryleia
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Chryleia]] is a [[Herald]] who refined a pill for [[Emriss Silentborn]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19">''Uncrowned'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|"My Herald Chryleia refined this herself, from fruits and flowers gathered throughout the world as well as a drop of my own sap."<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
